% =============================================================================
% AnalysisDataFlow PDF 导出 LaTeX 模板
% AnalysisDataFlow PDF Export LaTeX Template
% 
% 基于 Pandoc 的默认 LaTeX 模板定制
% Customized based on Pandoc's default LaTeX template
% =============================================================================

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 文档类设置
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\documentclass[
    11pt,
    a4paper
]{scrartcl}

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 基础包
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\usepackage[UTF8]{ctex}                    % 中文支持
\usepackage{lmodern}                       % Latin Modern 字体
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb,amsthm}        % 数学公式
\usepackage{graphicx}                      % 图片支持
\usepackage{xcolor}                        % 颜色支持
\usepackage{fancyvrb}                      % 代码块
\usepackage{fancyhdr}                      % 页眉页脚
\usepackage{geometry}                      % 页面几何
\usepackage{hyperref}                      % 超链接
\usepackage{booktabs}                      % 表格
\usepackage{longtable}                     % 长表格
\usepackage{multirow}                      % 多行单元格
\usepackage{array}                         % 表格增强
\usepackage{float}                         % 浮动体控制
\usepackage{caption}                       % 标题样式
\usepackage{subcaption}                    % 子标题
\usepackage{enumitem}                      % 列表样式
\usepackage{tcolorbox}                     % 彩色盒子
\usepackage{mdframed}                      % 框架盒子
\usepackage{tikz}                          % 绘图
\usepackage{titlesec}                      % 标题样式
\usepackage{tocloft}                       % 目录样式
\usepackage{listings}                      % 代码高亮
\usepackage{fontspec}                      % 字体设置
\usepackage{microtype}                     % 微排版
\usepackage{setspace}                      % 行间距

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 页面设置
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\geometry{
    top=25mm,
    bottom=25mm,
    left=30mm,
    right=25mm,
    headheight=14pt
}

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 字体设置
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\setmainfont{Latin Modern Roman}
\setsansfont{Latin Modern Sans}
\setmonofont{Latin Modern Mono}[Scale=0.9]

% 中文字体设置
\setCJKmainfont{Source Han Serif SC}[
    BoldFont=Source Han Serif SC Bold,
    ItalicFont=Source Han Serif SC Light
]
\setCJKsansfont{Source Han Sans SC}[
    BoldFont=Source Han Sans SC Bold
]
\setCJKmonofont{Noto Sans Mono CJK SC}[Scale=0.9]

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 颜色定义
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\definecolor{ADFPrimary}{HTML}{1565C0}      % 主色 - 深蓝
\definecolor{ADFSecondary}{HTML}{2E7D32}    % 次色 - 深绿
\definecolor{ADFAccent}{HTML}{E65100}       % 强调色 - 橙
\definecolor{ADFGray}{HTML}{616161}         % 灰色
\definecolor{ADFLightGray}{HTML}{F5F5F5}    % 浅灰
\definecolor{ADFCodeBG}{HTML}{F5F5F5}       % 代码背景
\definecolor{ADFBorder}{HTML}{E0E0E0}       % 边框色

% 定理框颜色
\definecolor{ThmBg}{HTML}{E8F4FD}
\definecolor{ThmBorder}{HTML}{2196F3}
\definecolor{ThmTitle}{HTML}{1976D2}

\definecolor{DefBg}{HTML}{E8F5E9}
\definecolor{DefBorder}{HTML}{4CAF50}
\definecolor{DefTitle}{HTML}{388E3C}

\definecolor{LemmaBg}{HTML}{FFF3E0}
\definecolor{LemmaBorder}{HTML}{FF9800}
\definecolor{LemmaTitle}{HTML}{F57C00}

\definecolor{PropBg}{HTML}{F3E5F5}
\definecolor{PropBorder}{HTML}{9C27B0}
\definecolor{PropTitle}{HTML}{7B1FA2}

\definecolor{CorBg}{HTML}{E0F2F1}
\definecolor{CorBorder}{HTML}{009688}
\definecolor{CorTitle}{HTML}{00796B}

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 超链接设置
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\hypersetup{
    colorlinks=true,
    linkcolor=ADFPrimary,
    filecolor=ADFSecondary,
    urlcolor=ADFSecondary,
    citecolor=ADFPrimary,
    bookmarks=true,
    bookmarksopen=true,
    bookmarksnumbered=true,
    pdfencoding=auto,
    psdextra
}

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 页眉页脚设置
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\fancyhead[L]{\small\textcolor{ADFGray}{AnalysisDataFlow}}
\fancyhead[R]{\small\textcolor{ADFGray}{\leftmark}}
\fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 标题样式设置
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\titleformat{\section}
    {\normalfont\Large\bfseries\color{ADFPrimary}}
    {\thesection}{1em}{}
\titleformat{\subsection}
    {\normalfont\large\bfseries\color{ADFPrimary}}
    {\thesubsection}{1em}{}
\titleformat{\subsubsection}
    {\normalfont\normalsize\bfseries\color{ADFGray}}
    {\thesubsubsection}{1em}{}

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 行间距设置
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\setstretch{1.3}

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 列表样式设置
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\setlist[itemize]{
    leftmargin=2em,
    itemsep=0.3em,
    parsep=0.2em
}
\setlist[enumerate]{
    leftmargin=2em,
    itemsep=0.3em,
    parsep=0.2em
}

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 代码块设置 (使用 listings)
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\lstset{
    backgroundcolor=\color{ADFCodeBG},
    basicstyle=\ttfamily\small,
    breakatwhitespace=false,
    breaklines=true,
    captionpos=b,
    commentstyle=\color{ADFSecondary},
    escapeinside={(*@}{@*)},
    extendedchars=true,
    frame=single,
    rulecolor=\color{ADFBorder},
    keepspaces=true,
    keywordstyle=\color{ADFPrimary}\bfseries,
    numbers=left,
    numbersep=10pt,
    numberstyle=\tiny\color{ADFGray},
    showspaces=false,
    showstringspaces=false,
    showtabs=false,
    stringstyle=\color{ADFAccent},
    tabsize=2,
    xleftmargin=15pt,
    xrightmargin=5pt,
    aboveskip=10pt,
    belowskip=10pt
}

% 代码语言定义
\lstdefinelanguage{yaml}{
    keywords={true,false,null,y,n},
    keywordstyle=\color{ADFPrimary}\bfseries,
    basicstyle=\ttfamily\small,
    sensitive=false,
    comment=[l]{\#},
    commentstyle=\color{ADFSecondary}\ttfamily,
    stringstyle=\color{ADFAccent}\ttfamily,
    moredelim=[l]{:},
    morestring=[b]',
    morestring=[b]"
}

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 定理/定义/引理/命题/推论 环境设置
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\usepackage[most]{tcolorbox}

% 定理环境
\newtcolorbox{theorembox}[1][]{
    enhanced,
    colback=ThmBg,
    colframe=ThmBorder,
    coltitle=ThmTitle,
    boxrule=0pt,
    leftrule=4pt,
    arc=0pt,
    outer arc=0pt,
    left=10pt,
    right=10pt,
    top=8pt,
    bottom=8pt,
    fonttitle=\bfseries,
    title=#1
}

% 定义环境
\newtcolorbox{definitionbox}[1][]{
    enhanced,
    colback=DefBg,
    colframe=DefBorder,
    coltitle=DefTitle,
    boxrule=0pt,
    leftrule=4pt,
    arc=0pt,
    outer arc=0pt,
    left=10pt,
    right=10pt,
    top=8pt,
    bottom=8pt,
    fonttitle=\bfseries,
    title=#1
}

% 引理环境
\newtcolorbox{lemmabox}[1][]{
    enhanced,
    colback=LemmaBg,
    colframe=LemmaBorder,
    coltitle=LemmaTitle,
    boxrule=0pt,
    leftrule=4pt,
    arc=0pt,
    outer arc=0pt,
    left=10pt,
    right=10pt,
    top=8pt,
    bottom=8pt,
    fonttitle=\bfseries,
    title=#1
}

% 命题环境
\newtcolorbox{propositionbox}[1][]{
    enhanced,
    colback=PropBg,
    colframe=PropBorder,
    coltitle=PropTitle,
    boxrule=0pt,
    leftrule=4pt,
    arc=0pt,
    outer arc=0pt,
    left=10pt,
    right=10pt,
    top=8pt,
    bottom=8pt,
    fonttitle=\bfseries,
    title=#1
}

% 推论环境
\newtcolorbox{corollarybox}[1][]{
    enhanced,
    colback=CorBg,
    colframe=CorBorder,
    coltitle=CorTitle,
    boxrule=0pt,
    leftrule=4pt,
    arc=0pt,
    outer arc=0pt,
    left=10pt,
    right=10pt,
    top=8pt,
    bottom=8pt,
    fonttitle=\bfseries,
    title=#1
}

% 注意框环境
\newtcolorbox{notebox}[1][注意 Note]{
    enhanced,
    colback=ADFLightGray,
    colframe=ADFGray,
    coltitle=white,
    boxrule=0pt,
    leftrule=4pt,
    arc=0pt,
    outer arc=0pt,
    left=10pt,
    right=10pt,
    top=8pt,
    bottom=8pt,
    fonttitle=\bfseries\color{white},
    attach boxed title to top left={yshift=-2mm, xshift=5mm},
    boxed title style={colback=ADFGray, arc=2pt},
    title=#1
}

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 表格样式设置
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\newcolumntype{L}[1]{>{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{#1}}
\newcolumntype{C}[1]{>{\centering\arraybackslash}p{#1}}
\newcolumntype{R}[1]{>{\raggedleft\arraybackslash}p{#1}}

% 表头样式
\newcommand{\thead}[1]{\textbf{#1}}

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 目录样式设置
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\renewcommand{\cftsecfont}{\bfseries\color{ADFPrimary}}
\renewcommand{\cftsubsecfont}{\color{ADFGray}}
\renewcommand{\cftsecpagefont}{\bfseries\color{ADFPrimary}}
\renewcommand{\cftsubsecpagefont}{\color{ADFGray}}
\setlength{\cftbeforesecskip}{6pt}
\setlength{\cftbeforesubsecskip}{3pt}

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 封面页定义
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\newcommand{\makeadfcover}[6]{%
    \begin{titlepage}
        \begin{tikzpicture}[remember picture,overlay]
            % 背景渐变
            \fill[ADFPrimary!10] (current page.south west) rectangle (current page.north east);
            
            % 装饰线条
            \draw[ADFPrimary, line width=3pt] 
                ([xshift=20mm,yshift=-30mm]current page.north west) -- 
                ([xshift=20mm,yshift=30mm]current page.south west);
            \draw[ADFSecondary, line width=1.5pt] 
                ([xshift=25mm,yshift=-30mm]current page.north west) -- 
                ([xshift=25mm,yshift=30mm]current page.south west);
            
            % 顶部装饰
            \fill[ADFPrimary] ([yshift=-20mm]current page.north west) rectangle 
                ([yshift=-25mm]current page.north east);
        \end{tikzpicture}
        
        \vspace*{4cm}
        
        \begin{center}
            {\fontsize{40}{48}\selectfont\bfseries\textcolor{ADFPrimary}{#1}}\\[0.8cm]
            {\Large\textcolor{ADFGray}{#2}}\\[2cm]
            
            \rule{0.6\textwidth}{0.5pt}\\[1.5cm]
            
            {\LARGE\bfseries #3}\\[0.5cm]
            {\large\textcolor{ADFGray}{#4}}\\[3cm]
            
            \begin{tikzpicture}
                \node[draw=ADFPrimary, line width=1.5pt, rounded corners=5pt, 
                      inner sep=15pt, fill=white] {
                    \begin{minipage}{0.5\textwidth}
                        \centering
                        \large\textbf{版本 Version}\\[0.3cm]
                        \textcolor{ADFPrimary}{\Large #5}\\[0.5cm]
                        \large\textbf{日期 Date}\\[0.3cm]
                        \textcolor{ADFPrimary}{\Large #6}
                    \end{minipage}
                };
            \end{tikzpicture}
            
            \vfill
            
            {\small\textcolor{ADFGray}{\textit{由 PDF Export Tool 生成 | Generated by PDF Export Tool}}}
        \end{center}
    \end{titlepage}
}

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 章节前封面定义
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\newcommand{\makechaptercover}[2]{%
    \newpage
    \thispagestyle{empty}
    \begin{tikzpicture}[remember picture,overlay]
        \fill[ADFPrimary!5] (current page.south west) rectangle (current page.north east);
        \draw[ADFPrimary, line width=2pt] 
            ([xshift=15mm]current page.north west) -- 
            ([xshift=15mm]current page.south west);
    \end{tikzpicture}
    
    \vspace*{6cm}
    
    \begin{center}
        {\fontsize{30}{36}\selectfont\bfseries\textcolor{ADFPrimary}{#1}}\\[1cm]
        {\large\textcolor{ADFGray}{#2}}
    \end{center}
    
    \newpage
}

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 文档信息变量
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\title{AnalysisDataFlow}
\subtitle{流计算理论模型与工程实践知识库}
\author{AnalysisDataFlow Project Team}
\date{\today}

% =============================================================================
% 文档开始
% =============================================================================
\begin{document}

% 封面页
\makeadfcover
    {AnalysisDataFlow}
    {流计算理论模型与工程实践知识库}
    {Unified Streaming Theory Model}
    {and Engineering Practice Knowledge Base}
    {v2.9}
    {\today}

% 目录
\newpage
\tableofcontents
\thispagestyle{empty}

\newpage
\setcounter{page}{1}

% 正文内容
$body$

\end{document}
